title: Executive head" defined
doc_html:
§1423.  "Executive head" defined

As used in the compact, with reference to this state, the term "executive head" shall mean the governor.

Added by Acts 1968, No. 273, §16; Acts 1968, No. 296, §1.

§1423.  "Executive head" defined

Added by Acts 1968, No. 273, §16; Acts 1968, No. 296, §1.
